use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in web applications
Icon-based action buttons for toolbars and interfaces
Multi-variant button system for different contextual actions
ai_summary: A generic button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management and Radix UI Slot for composition patterns. Includes accessibility features like focus-visible states and disabled state handling with forwardRef support for DOM manipulation.
